hero.title: Join the
hero.subtitle: Linesia, the unique Minecraft Bedrock server. SkyFaction, temporary game modes, KitFFA and much more. Available on PC, mobile and console.

server.label: Join
server.title: How to join Linesia
server.subtitle: Bedrock server available on PC, mobile and console
server.pcStep1desc: Launch Minecraft from the Microsoft Store (Windows 10/11).
server.pcStep2desc: Go to Play > Servers > Add Server. Enter the IP play.linesia.net and port 19132.
server.pcStep3desc: Select Linesia from your list and join the game.
server.mobileStep1desc: Launch the game on your phone or tablet.
server.mobileStep2desc: Click Add Server and enter the IP play.linesia.net and port 19132.
server.consoleStep1desc: Launch Minecraft on Xbox, PlayStation or Switch.
server.consoleStep2desc: Search for the Gamertag 'LinesiaJoin' and add it as a friend.
server.consoleStep3desc: Go to LinesiaJoin's profile and click 'Join Game'.
server.consoleNoteDesc: On console, you must add the LinesiaJoin bot as a friend to join the server. This is the only connection method.

features.label: Game Modes
features.title: Discover
features.subtitle: A unique Bedrock server with a main game mode, temporary modes and non-stop PvP

pvp.title: SkyFaction
pvp.desc: The main mode: farming, progression, faction islands, jobs, prestiges and quests combined with PvP, raids and events. 3-month seasons.

factions.title: Warzone & Events
factions.desc: Fight in the warzone, participate in competitive PvP events: Domination, Nexus, Outpost, sticks and much more.

dimensions.title: Temporary Modes
dimensions.desc: Every month, a new mode drops: Fallen Kingdom, RustMC, UHC, BedWars, SkyWars... for a weekend, a week or a full month.

events.title: KitFFA
events.desc: Want to PvP? KitFFA is open 24/7 to practice and fight other players at any time.

progression.title: Progression & Prestiges
progression.desc: Unlock prestige levels, complete quests, rank up and become the most powerful player on the server.

community.title: Active Community
community.desc: Join a passionate community on Discord. Tournaments, giveaways, and a staff team that listens.

news.label: News
news.title: Latest News
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest server news

store.label: Store
store.title: Linesia
store.subtitle: Support the server and get gems to unlock exclusive content

showcase.label: Preview
showcase.title: Dive into
showcase.subtitle: Discover the different worlds waiting for you on Linesia
showcase.warzoneDesc: A massive spawn with epic builds. Explore, fight and dominate the SkyFaction warzone.
showcase.kitffaDesc: Fight other players in PvP 24/7. Perfect for training or proving your worth.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.a1: Yes, Linesia is completely free! The store offers optional cosmetic perks.
faq.q2: Which platforms can I play on?
faq.a2: Linesia is a Bedrock server, available on PC (Windows 10/11), mobile, tablet and consoles (Xbox, PlayStation, Switch) via the LinesiaJoin bot.
faq.a3: It's Linesia's main mode: a mix of Skyblock and Faction. Farming, progression, islands, jobs and prestiges on the Skyblock side, and warzone, raids, events and sticks on the PvP Faction side. Each season lasts about 3 months.
faq.a4: Yes! Every month a temporary mode is available (Fallen Kingdom, RustMC, UHC, BedWars, SkyWars...) and KitFFA is open 24/7 for PvP.
faq.a5: Through Discord or by email at support@linesia.net. Response within 24 hours.

footer.description: The Minecraft Bedrock server with SkyFaction, temporary modes and KitFFA. Join the adventure.
